title: Minimal Mek
description: Explore the possibilities of kinetic and electric energy. Challenge your creativity, and build your next adventure.
body:
![MinimalMek wordmark logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/t8OJLJzo/images/688d77469726d5e55970529cf26f965388651962.png)\
***Minimal Mek*** aims to bring the best of kinetic and electric energy to the world of *Minecraft*, built on *Mekanism* and *Create*. Tech not your style? Explore vast new lands with *Quark*, collect an assortment of bees (or trees) with *Productive Bees* (or *Productive Trees*), or build the base of your dreams with several decorative mods all included!

## Included Mods

## Server Installation
Play with friends or others, install the server-side mods using [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install).
